title: Fix session hosting issue

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the issue preventing users from successfully hosting a new pickleball session. This includes the full flow: submitting the SessionConfigForm (court count selection), calling the backend to create the session, receiving the session code, and navigating to the HostSessionDashboard. Ensure errors are caught and surfaced to the user with clear messages rather than silently failing.
acceptanceCriteria: A user can open the Create Session page and select a court count without errors.
Submitting the SessionConfigForm successfully calls the backend createSession (or equivalent) function.
On success, the session code is displayed in SessionCodeDisplay and the user can navigate to the HostSessionDashboard.
If the backend call fails, a descriptive error toast or message is shown to the user.
No unhandled promise rejections or console errors occur during the hosting flow.
The fix handles both authenticated (Internet Identity) and guest users if both are supported as hosts.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all Motoko backend logic in backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Adding new session configuration options beyond what already exists.
